body_txt: Aliens ' First Contact with Earthlings will go one of two ways, usually.  It's a Schrödinger's Gun ; mankind is either an aggressive oppressor or a clueless victim, and never in the beneficial combination. The trope name comes from the signature line of "Captain Kirk" in the song "Star Trekkin" by The Firm. (Contrary to popular belief, Kirk never actually said this on the show .) A subversion of I Come in Peace . Aliens who try this should read How to Invade an Alien Planet . Sister Trope to First Contact Faux Pas .
